rulings.Case Title: ASHLEY HOWITT VS. ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 1. Defendant'S Motion For Summary Judgment GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Request for dismissal is procedurally improper at this time. Cravens v. State Bd. of Equalization (1997) 52 Cal.App.4th 253. Defendant to prepare order and judgment. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ASHLEY HOWITT VS. ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE, BONNIE SPINDLER, MATTHEW BORLAND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MITCHELL BOYD ET AL VS. CARLA CLAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renewed Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Prior Order To Vacate Default Judgment; Declaration Of K. Doran; Memo Of Pts And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT KELLY DORAN Renewed Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Prior Order To Vacate Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under CCP 1008 re: new facts, circumstances or law. Additionally, nothing presented to the Court in this motion changes the ruling on the underlying motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT FAY SERVICING, LLC, WILMINGTON TRUST, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Newly added causes of action are preempted by HOLA. Additionally, the property is owned by a trust, not a natural person and not a borrower within the meaning of HBOR. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LIMOR ELBAZ VS. LISHA HANNAFIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Appointing A Partition Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF LIMOR ELBAZ Notice Of Motion And Motion Appointing A Partition Referee continued to October 28, 2019. Each side to provide 2 names of proposed partition referees along with qualifications, rates and availability by 2:00 p.m. on October 24, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Defendant Ryan Singer To (1) Respond To Form Interrogatories-Set One; (2) Respond To Request For Production Of Documents-Set One;(3) Deem Matters Admitted; (4) Appear At Deposition; And (5) Pay Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF 20MISSION SF, LLC Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Defendant Ryan Singer To (1) Respond To Form Interrogatories-Set One; (2) Respond To Request For Production Of Documents-Set One;(3) Deem Matters Admitted; (4) Appear At Deposition; And (5) Pay Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to the written discovery and to appear for deposition. Plaintiff to provide notice of new deposition date. Sanctions granted in the amount of $685 to be paid within 20 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 17, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT LINDA TRINH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action no unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Furthermore, the unlawful detainer is solely concerned with possession. It is Plaintiff's position (per the allegations and prayer asserted in the complaint) that possession is not being sought from the tenant. If tenant asserts possessory rights contrary to Plaintiff's understanding, a Claim of Right to Possession procedure is available to the tenant. = (501/CFH)
